title: Diagnose a failing find_package
description: A procedure to work out why find_package cannot locate a package and to point it at the right config or module.
body: Use when find_package reports a package not found despite it being installed. Do not work around it by hardcoding paths. Steps: rerun configure with --debug-find or set CMAKE_FIND_DEBUG_MODE to see search paths; confirm whether the package ships a config file or needs a Find module; set CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH or the package's _DIR variable to the install location; reconfigure. Validation signals include the imported target becoming available and the consumer linking. Risk boundary: silencing the failure with manual paths hides version mismatches, so resolve the discovery itself.
